_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Lateral & Advanced lateral skull base surgery (for benign conditions)
clinical_indications: persistent chronic otitis media (despite previous mastoidectomy and where hearing reconstruction is not possible)
skull base osteomyelitis not responding to medical management

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the procedure
CT/MRI/biopsy to establish the indication and justify the surgery

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers with daily vitals and line of treatment
Post procedure clinical photograph of the affected part

ppd_preauth.q: Were the Clinical notes, detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, planned line of treatment & advise for admission submitted?
Was the CT/MRI/ biopsy to establish the indication and justify the surgery submitted?
Was the Audiogram report justifying surgery submitted? (If applicable)

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Was Detailed Procedure / Operative Notes submitted?
Was the Post procedure clinical photograph of the affected part submitted?
Was the Detailed discharge summary submitted?

common_queries: CT/MRI/biopsy of affected side not indicative of surgery or not submitted.
Clinical notes, detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, planned line of treatment & advise for admission not submitted or incomplete.
Audiogram report not submitted or not justifying surgery (if applicable).
Histopathology report not submitted at claim stage.
Post procedure clinical photograph of the affected part not submitted at claim stage.
Detailed Procedure / Operative Notes not submitted at claim stage.

clinical_key_pointers: It is the extenteration of the pathology and all the air cells of the temporal bone, including the middle ear and mastoid air cells with the aim of a dry and safe ear. This procedure is accompanied by blind sac closure of the external auditory canal along with cavity obliteration with muscle.
additional_information.referral_criteria: referral of cases to the appropriate level of care (as required) for treatment of patients under PMJAY
